findings.message: Container is missing CPU limits. Set resources.limits.cpu to prevent CPU resource monopolization.
Container is missing CPU requests. Set resources.requests.cpu to ensure predictable resource allocation and prevent scheduling issues.
Container is missing memory limits. Set resources.limits.memory to prevent memory resource issues.
Container is missing memory requests. Set resources.requests.memory to ensure predictable resource allocation and prevent scheduling issues.

Container 'test-container' uses image 'alpine:latest' which uses non-specific tag ':latest'. Use a specific version tag (e.g., 'nginx:1.21.6') to ensure reproducible builds and prevent unexpected updates.
Container is missing ephemeral storage limits. Set resources.limits.ephemeral-storage to prevent uncontrolled storage consumption and ensure predictable resource usage.
Container is missing ephemeral storage requests. Set resources.requests.ephemeral-storage to ensure predictable resource allocation and prevent scheduling issues.
